examples.en: She can act like a cat.
We must act now.

synonymDiff: act侧重扮演角色或采取行动, perform侧重在观众面前表演

examples.en: Lights, camera, action!
We need to take action.
Rain affects our picnic plan.
examples.cn: 下雨影响了我们的野餐计划。

examples.en: What you eat affects your health.
examples.cn: 你吃的东西会影响你的健康。

synonymDiff: affects侧重产生直接的作用或改变, influences侧重潜移默化的影响

examples.en: AI can help us learn new things.
examples.cn: 人工智能能帮我们学新东西。

examples.en: This robot uses AI.
examples.cn: 这个机器人使用了人工智能。

examples.en: I am allergic to peanuts.
Are you allergic to cats?
Don't leave me alone.
She likes to read alone.
I always brush my teeth.
Mom always helps me.
I love animals.
There are many animals in the zoo.
I feel anxious before the test.
Don't be anxious, you will be fine.

synonymDiff: anxious侧重内心的担忧和不安, nervous侧重紧张不自然, worried侧重对具体事情的担心

examples.en: Can I ask you a question?
Ask your teacher for help.
Flowers attract bees.
Bright colors attract birds.
Leaves turn red in autumn.
I like autumn best.

synonymDiff: autumn是英式英语用法, fall是美式英语用法, 意思相同

examples.en: Is this seat available?
No more tickets are available.
Time for a bath!
The baby loves bath time.

synonymDiff: bath指泡在浴缸里洗澡, shower指淋浴

examples.en: What a beautiful flower!
The sunset is beautiful.

synonymDiff: beautiful强调令人赞叹的美, pretty指小巧精致的好看, lovely侧重令人愉悦的可爱

examples.en: She is becoming a good reader.
examples.cn: 她正在成为一个好读者。

examples.en: The weather is becoming warmer.
Beijing is the capital of China.
I want to visit Beijing.
I am a bit tired.
Can I have a bit of cake?
Roses bloom in spring.
The garden is in full bloom.

synonymDiff: bloom泛指花朵绽放, blossom多指果树开花

examples.en: Exercise is good for your body.
examples.cn: 锻炼对你的身体有好处。

examples.en: Your body needs water.
Can I borrow your pencil?
I borrow books from the library.

synonymDiff: borrow指从别人那里借入, lend指把自己的东西借出给别人

examples.en: I like both cats and dogs.
Both hands are clean.
Take a deep breathe in.
Fish breathe in water.
My dad has a small business.
She wants to start a business.
The bees are buzzing around.
I hear something buzzing.
examples.cn: 我听到什么东西在嗡嗡响。

examples.en: Can you calculate 5 plus 3?
We use a calculator to calculate.

synonymDiff: calculate侧重数学运算, count侧重逐个数数, compute侧重用电脑计算

examples.en: I cannot swim yet.
You cannot run in the hall.
I care about my friends.
She takes care of her little brother.
The seasons are always changing.
I am changing my clothes.
I need to charge my phone.
How much do they charge?
Check your homework before you turn it in.
Let me check the time.

synonymDiff: check侧重快速确认, examine侧重仔细检查

examples.en: Don't touch the chemical bottles.
Water is a chemical compound.
I speak Chinese at home.
We eat Chinese food today.
I have an English class today.
There are 30 students in my class.

synonymDiff: class指一节课或一个班级, lesson侧重一节课的教学内容

examples.en: The client is happy with our work.
examples.cn: 客户对我们的工作很满意。

examples.en: We have a new client.

synonymDiff: client多指长期合作的专业服务客户, customer指普通购物的顾客

examples.en: Put on your clothes.
I need new clothes for school.

synonymDiff: clothes是日常用语, clothing更正式, 也指衣物的总称

examples.en: What color do you like?
Let's color the picture.
examples.cn: 我们来给图画涂颜色吧。

examples.en: Cats are common pets.
Colds are common in winter.

synonymDiff: common强调常见不稀奇, ordinary强调普通不特别, usual强调惯常的

examples.en: This puzzle is too complex for me.
examples.cn: 这个谜题对我来说太复杂了。

examples.en: The human body is very complex.

synonymDiff: complex指由多个部分组成的复杂, complicated指难以理解或处理的复杂

examples.en: Thank you for your concern.
Safety is our main concern.
examples.cn: 安全是我们最关心的事。

synonymDiff: concern语气较正式, 含关切之意, worry更偏向焦虑担忧

examples.en: A bridge connects the two sides.
This road connects our town to the city.
examples.cn: 这条路连接我们的镇和城市。

synonymDiff: connects侧重建立联系或连通, links侧重环环相扣的关联, joins侧重合在一起

examples.en: She created a beautiful painting.
examples.cn: 她创作了一幅美丽的画。

examples.en: Who created this game?

synonymDiff: created强调从无到有的创造, made泛指制作或制造

examples.en: Use the crossing to cross the street.
Look both ways before crossing.
We had a cultural festival at school.
examples.cn: 我们学校举办了文化节。

examples.en: Every country has its own cultural traditions.
examples.cn: 每个国家都有自己的文化传统。

examples.en: It is a hard decision.
You made a good decision.

synonymDiff: decision侧重经过思考后的决定, choice侧重在多个选项中做选择

examples.en: Let's decorate the Christmas tree.
We decorate our classroom for the party.
The dog defended its owner.
He defended his little sister.

synonymDiff: defended侧重面对攻击时的防卫, protected侧重提前采取措施保护

examples.en: It is 30 degrees today.
Water boils at 100 degrees.
This cake is delicious!
Mom makes delicious soup.

synonymDiff: delicious较正式, 强调非常好吃, tasty日常用语指味道好, yummy是儿童常用的口语

examples.en: She deserves a gold star.
Everyone deserves to be happy.
The storm destroyed many trees.
The old building was destroyed.
What's for dinner tonight?
We have dinner at six.

synonymDiff: dinner指一天中最正式的一餐, supper指较晚的简便晚餐

examples.en: Be quiet during class.
We play outside during recess.
examples.cn: 课间休息时我们在外面玩。

examples.en: My grandma is eighty-five years old.
There are eighty-five apples in the box.
examples.cn: 箱子里有八十五个苹果。

examples.en: We should protect the environment.
Trees help keep the environment clean.
examples.cn: 树木帮助保持环境清洁。

synonymDiff: surroundings侧重周围的事物和空间, environment侧重自然生态环境或整体环境条件。

examples.en: Two plus two is equal to four.
Everyone should have equal chances to play.
examples.cn: 每个人都应该有平等的机会玩。

synonymDiff: same强调完全一样, equal强调数量或价值上相等。

examples.en: The volcano may erupt at any time.
examples.cn: 这座火山随时可能喷发。

examples.en: Hot lava erupted from the mountain.
examples.cn: 滚烫的岩浆从山上喷发出来。

examples.en: We stayed up late on New Year's Eve.
examples.cn: 我们在新年前夕熬夜了。

examples.en: On Christmas Eve, we hang up stockings.
examples.cn: 在圣诞前夕，我们挂上袜子。

examples.en: Everyone in my class likes music.
examples.cn: 我们班每个人都喜欢音乐。

examples.en: Good morning, everyone!

synonymDiff: everybody和everyone意思相同, everyone更常用于书面语。

examples.en: I put everything back in the box.
examples.cn: 我把所有东西放回了箱子里。

examples.en: Everything is ready for the party.
examples.cn: 派对的一切都准备好了。

examples.en: I have a math exam tomorrow.
examples.cn: 我明天有一场数学考试。

examples.en: She did well on the exam.

synonymDiff: test常指小测验或随堂测试, exam常指较正式的考试。

examples.en: The soccer game was so exciting!
examples.cn: 那场足球赛太令人兴奋了！

examples.en: Going to the zoo is always exciting.
examples.cn: 去动物园总是令人兴奋的。

synonymDiff: thrilling侧重惊险刺激的感觉, exciting侧重普遍的兴奋和激动。

examples.en: The weather is fairly warm today.
The teacher treats everyone fairly.
examples.cn: 老师公平地对待每个人。

examples.en: Blue is my favorite color.
examples.cn: 蓝色是我最喜欢的颜色。

examples.en: What is your favorite food?
examples.cn: 你最喜欢的食物是什么？

examples.en: Please flush the toilet after you use it.
She flushed water over her hands.
The little duck follows its mother.
Please follow me to the classroom.
Don't forget to bring your lunch box.
I always forget where I put my keys.
examples.cn: 我总是忘记把钥匙放在哪里了。

examples.en: Water can form ice when it is cold.
Please fill in this form with your name.
examples.cn: 请在这张表格上填写你的名字。

examples.en: The brave knight fought the dragon.
examples.cn: 勇敢的骑士和龙战斗了。

examples.en: They fought hard to win the game.
examples.cn: 他们奋力拼搏赢得了比赛。

examples.en: What do you want to be in the future?
In the future, cars might fly.
You can gain knowledge by reading books.
examples.cn: 你可以通过读书获得知识。

examples.en: The baby gained two pounds this month.
examples.cn: 宝宝这个月增重了两磅。

synonymDiff: get是最常用的口语表达, gain更强调通过努力逐步获得。

examples.en: This story has been told for generations.
examples.cn: 这个故事已经讲了好几代了。

examples.en: Three generations live in our house.
Eye color is genetic.
She studies genetic science at school.
The ring is made of gold.
She won a gold medal in the race.
examples.cn: 她在比赛中赢得了一枚金牌。

examples.en: The sunset turned the sky golden.
examples.cn: 日落把天空染成了金色。

examples.en: She has a golden retriever named Max.
You did a great job on your homework!
The Great Wall is very long.

synonymDiff: wonderful侧重令人赞叹和惊喜, great更通用，既可表示很好也可表示伟大。

examples.en: The ball fell to the ground.
Don't sit on the wet ground.
What happens when you mix red and blue?
examples.cn: 把红色和蓝色混合会发生什么？

examples.en: Something funny happens in this story.
examples.cn: 这个故事里发生了一件有趣的事。

synonymDiff: occurs更正式和书面化, happens更口语化和日常。

examples.en: Too much candy harms your teeth.
examples.cn: 吃太多糖果会伤害你的牙齿。

examples.en: Pollution harms the animals in the sea.
examples.cn: 污染伤害了海里的动物。

examples.en: We can feel the heat from the sun.
examples.cn: 我们能感受到太阳的热量。

examples.en: Mom heats the soup for dinner.
Water is made of hydrogen and oxygen.
Hydrogen is the lightest element.
The game has an immersive 3D world.
examples.cn: 这个游戏有一个沉浸式的3D世界。

examples.en: The museum has an immersive dinosaur show.
examples.cn: 博物馆有一场沉浸式的恐龙展。

examples.en: It is important to drink water every day.
Breakfast is the most important meal.
Practice improves your reading skills.
examples.cn: 练习能提高你的阅读能力。

examples.en: She improves a little every day.
You can find information in the library.
examples.cn: 你可以在图书馆找到信息。

examples.en: This book has a lot of useful information.
examples.cn: 这本书有很多有用的信息。

examples.en: This book is very interesting.
The teacher told us an interesting story.
examples.cn: 老师给我们讲了一个有趣的故事。

synonymDiff: fascinating强调深深吸引人、令人着迷, interesting指一般的有趣和引起兴趣。

examples.en: Her interests include drawing and singing.
examples.cn: 她的兴趣包括画画和唱歌。

examples.en: We share the same interests.

synonymDiff: hobbies指具体的业余爱好活动, interests范围更广，指感兴趣的事物或领域。

examples.en: I just finished my homework.
It is just a little cat.
I want to learn how to swim.
We learn new words every day.

synonymDiff: study侧重学习的过程和努力, learn侧重学会和掌握的结果。

examples.en: I learned to ride a bike last summer.
examples.cn: 我去年夏天学会了骑自行车。

examples.en: She learned ten new words today.
examples.cn: 她今天学了十个新单词。

examples.en: I live in a small town.
Fish live in the water.
The main character in the story is a girl.
examples.cn: 故事里的主要人物是一个女孩。

examples.en: What is the main idea of this book?
examples.cn: 这本书的主要思想是什么？

examples.en: She manages to finish all her work on time.
examples.cn: 她设法按时完成了所有的工作。

examples.en: He manages the school library.
Maybe it will rain tomorrow.
Maybe we can go to the park later.
examples.cn: 也许我们待会儿可以去公园。

synonymDiff: perhaps比maybe更正式, maybe更常用于日常口语。

examples.en: Merry Christmas, everyone!
The children had a merry time at the party.
examples.cn: 孩子们在派对上玩得很开心。

synonymDiff: happy指一般的高兴和幸福, merry强调欢快热闹的气氛。

examples.en: The spoon is made of metal.
Iron and copper are common metals.
Everyone makes mistakes sometimes.
I made a mistake on my test.
examples.cn: 我在考试中犯了一个错误。

synonymDiff: error更正式，常用于技术和科学场景, mistake更口语化，指日常的犯错。

examples.en: My mom makes the best pancakes.
examples.cn: 我妈妈做的煎饼最好吃了。

examples.en: I love my mom very much.
She folded her clothes neatly.
examples.cn: 她把衣服叠得整整齐齐。

examples.en: Please write your name neatly.
I have never seen snow before.
Never give up on your dreams.
examples.cn: 永远不要放弃你的梦想。

examples.en: My great-grandma lived to be ninety.
examples.cn: 我的曾祖母活到了九十岁。

examples.en: There are ninety students in our grade.
examples.cn: 我们年级有九十个学生。

examples.en: What is your phone number?
Seven is my lucky number.
We can take online classes at home.
She likes to read stories online.
There are three options for lunch today.
You have two options: red or blue.
examples.cn: 你有两个选择：红色或蓝色。

synonymDiff: choices强调做选择的行为, options强调可供选择的选项本身。

examples.en: This is our classroom.
Our dog likes to play in the yard.
examples.cn: 我们的狗喜欢在院子里玩。

examples.en: I have my own room at home.
She owns a cute little rabbit.
examples.cn: 她拥有一只可爱的小兔子。

examples.en: Learning to draw takes a lot of patience.
Thank you for your patience.
A large percentage of kids like ice cream.
examples.cn: 很大比例的孩子喜欢冰淇淋。

examples.en: What percentage of the pie is left?
examples.cn: 这个派还剩百分之多少？

examples.en: You drew a perfect circle!
This is a perfect day for a picnic.
examples.cn: 今天是野餐的完美日子。

synonymDiff: ideal侧重理想中最好的状态，perfect侧重没有任何缺点。

examples.en: This is a nice place to play.
examples.cn: 这是一个玩耍的好地方。

examples.en: Please place the book on the table.

synonymDiff: spot侧重某个具体的小位置，place侧重更大或更一般的地方。

examples.en: Can you point to the red ball?
examples.cn: 你能指一下那个红色的球吗？

examples.en: I got ten points in the game.
Our team scored twenty points!
The teacher made three important points.
examples.cn: 老师讲了三个重要的要点。

examples.en: The balloon popped with a loud bang.
Dad popped some popcorn for us.
examples.cn: 爸爸给我们爆了一些爆米花。

examples.en: Superheroes have special powers.
examples.cn: 超级英雄有特殊的超能力。

examples.en: Reading gives you great powers.
The fruit is preserved in a jar.
The old toy was well preserved.
examples.cn: 那个旧玩具保存得很好。

examples.en: Can you print your name on the paper?
examples.cn: 你能在纸上写上你的名字吗？

examples.en: Mom will print the picture for you.
examples.cn: 妈妈会帮你把图片打印出来。

examples.en: Can you solve this math problem?
No problem! I can help you.

synonymDiff: trouble侧重麻烦和困扰，problem侧重需要解决的具体问题。

examples.en: I finished all the math problems.
examples.cn: 我做完了所有的数学题。

examples.en: We can fix these problems together.
examples.cn: 我们可以一起解决这些问题。

examples.en: Hens produce eggs every day.
Trees produce oxygen for us.

synonymDiff: make侧重动手做出东西，produce侧重通过过程生产出成果。

examples.en: Dad pumps air into the bicycle tire.
examples.cn: 爸爸给自行车轮胎打气。

examples.en: The water pumps are very useful.
The rabbit runs very quickly.
Please eat your breakfast quickly.

synonymDiff: fast既可作副词也可作形容词，quickly只作副词，rapidly更正式。

examples.en: Raise your hand if you know the answer.
examples.cn: 如果你知道答案就举手。

examples.en: The farmer raises chickens on the farm.

synonymDiff: lift侧重把东西从低处搬到高处，raise侧重把东西升高或培养。

examples.en: I can't reach the top shelf.
examples.cn: 我够不到最上面的架子。

examples.en: We will reach the park in five minutes.
examples.cn: 我们五分钟后到达公园。

examples.en: Climbing too high has risks.
We should know the risks before we start.
examples.cn: 我们在开始之前应该了解风险。

synonymDiff: dangers侧重已经存在的危险，risks侧重可能发生坏事的可能性。

examples.en: We jump rope at recess.
Hold the rope tightly!
I have a runny nose today.
The egg is too runny.
Let's play hide and seek!
The bird seeks food in the garden.
examples.cn: 小鸟在花园里寻找食物。

synonymDiff: search侧重仔细查找某个地方，seek侧重努力追寻目标。

examples.en: I sent a letter to Grandma.
Mom sent me to buy some milk.
The teacher looks very serious today.
examples.cn: 老师今天看起来很严肃。

examples.en: Are you serious about learning piano?
examples.cn: 你是认真想学钢琴的吗？

examples.en: Please set the cups on the table.
I got a new set of crayons.
We go shopping every weekend.
Mom made a shopping list.
examples.cn: 妈妈列了一份购物清单。

examples.en: We learned to ski in the mountains.
She put on her skis and went down the hill.
examples.cn: 她穿上滑雪板滑下山坡。

examples.en: The turtle walks slowly.
Please read slowly so I can follow.
examples.cn: 请慢慢读，这样我能跟上。

examples.en: The flower smells so sweet.
The cake smells delicious!
Can you solve this puzzle?
Let's work together to solve the problem.
examples.cn: 我们一起来解决这个问题。

examples.en: Let's sing a song together.
That is my favorite song.
Please speak louder, I can't hear you.
examples.cn: 请说大声点，我听不到你。

examples.en: She can speak two languages.

synonymDiff: talk侧重日常交谈、聊天，speak侧重正式地讲或具备语言能力。

examples.en: Can you spell your name?
I learned to spell ten new words today.
examples.cn: 我今天学会了拼写十个新单词。

examples.en: School starts at eight o'clock.
The movie starts in five minutes.

synonymDiff: begins更正式一些，starts更口语化，日常生活中更常用。

examples.en: I like dogs is a statement.
The teacher asked us to write a statement.
examples.cn: 老师让我们写一句陈述句。

examples.en: Take one step forward.
Be careful on the steps!
Follow these three steps to make a cake.
examples.cn: 按照这三个步骤来做蛋糕。

examples.en: There are ten steps to the door.
Are you still hungry?
Please sit still for the photo.
examples.cn: 拍照的时候请坐着不要动。

examples.en: The elephants stomp through the jungle.
examples.cn: 大象在丛林中重重地踏步。

examples.en: Don't stomp your feet on the floor!

synonymDiff: stamp侧重用脚用力踩某个地方，stomp侧重大声地跺脚走路。

examples.en: Math is my favorite subject.
examples.cn: 数学是我最喜欢的科目。

examples.en: What is the subject of this book?

synonymDiff: topic侧重谈话或文章的话题，subject侧重学科或更正式的主题。

examples.en: The science experiment was successful!
She is a successful student.
Are you sure this is the right way?
Sure, I will help you!

synonymDiff: certain更正式、更强调有把握，sure更口语化、更随意。

examples.en: We planned a surprise for Mom's birthday.
examples.cn: 我们为妈妈的生日准备了惊喜。

examples.en: The gift was a big surprise!
examples.cn: 这个礼物真是一个大惊喜！

examples.en: The lemon has a sharp tang.
examples.cn: 这个柠檬有一股强烈的酸味。

examples.en: I like the tang of orange juice.
examples.cn: 我喜欢橙汁那种酸酸的味道。

examples.en: Put your things in your bag.
There are many fun things to do here.
examples.cn: 这里有很多好玩的事情可以做。

examples.en: I want to travel around the world.
We travel to Grandma's house every summer.
examples.cn: 我们每年夏天去奶奶家。

synonymDiff: journey侧重一段较长的旅程，travel侧重旅行这个行为本身。

examples.en: The doctor is treating my cold.
Dad is treating us to ice cream.
Twist the cap to open the bottle.
The story has a funny twist at the end.
examples.cn: 这个故事结尾有个有趣的转折。

examples.en: We had an unexpected visitor today.
examples.cn: 今天我们来了一位意想不到的客人。

examples.en: The rain was unexpected.

synonymDiff: surprising侧重让人吃惊的感受，unexpected侧重事先没有预料到。

examples.en: Can I use your pencil?
examples.cn: 我能用一下你的铅笔吗？

examples.en: Use a spoon to eat the soup.
Eat your vegetables, they are good for you.
examples.cn: 吃蔬菜，它们对你有好处。

examples.en: We grow vegetables in our garden.
The puppy is very cute.
I am very happy today.
We visit Grandma every Sunday.
examples.cn: 我们每个星期天去看奶奶。

examples.en: Let's visit the zoo this weekend.
examples.cn: 我们这个周末去参观动物园吧。

examples.en: There are many ways to say hello.
We found two ways to solve the puzzle.
examples.cn: 我们找到了两种解谜的方法。

examples.en: You sing very well!
I don't feel well today.
There are many animals in the world.
She wants to travel the world.
This answer is wrong. Try again.
examples.cn: 这个答案是错的。再试一次。

examples.en: What's wrong? Are you sad?
I like to eat apples.
She runs fast like a cheetah.
She works as a teacher.
As I walked home, it started to rain.
examples.cn: 当我走回家时，开始下雨了。
